Text.Page:
Perhaps you've already seen those whirling platforms in the sky. We don't know what they are, nor much about what they do.

Here's what I do know: at intervals they create some kind of...opening that spews out monsters from some other place. They're not from the Dream and not argons.

I think it's something you're going to need to experience for yourself.

Oh, and did I mention the affected areas are getting bigger? We not only have to know what's happening out there, we have to stop it.

You'll be assigned here for a while. I won't lie—it's not an easy posting, and our researchers will be calling on your help on a daily basis.

We can, however, offer generous rewards and no shortage of excitement.
